pains.theme: No audit trail for AI-assisted edits
pains.quote: Risk won't sign off until we can show who changed what and when.
Every new associate needs an hour of hand-holding to start.

pains.theme: No audit trail for AI-assisted edits
pains.quote: Without an exportable audit log this fails our internal review.

pains.theme: Can't restrict who approves sensitive matters
pains.quote: We need approval permissions by practice group.
The first session is great, then people drift back to old habits.

pains.theme: Citations not always traceable to the source
pains.quote: I can't trust a summary I can't click through to the clause.

pains.theme: No audit trail for AI-assisted edits
pains.quote: The board asks how we govern this and I need a clean answer.

pains.theme: Can't restrict who approves sensitive matters
pains.quote: Junior staff should not be able to approve high-value matters.

pains.theme: Citations not always traceable to the source
pains.quote: Grounding is the whole trust question for our partners.
I'd like to see which teams are actually using it each week.
